Name: Inspection → estimate demo path hardening
Definition of Done: End-to-end flow from inspection checklist to estimate with rationale/confidence and fallback handling.
Acceptance Tests: Happy path estimate works; forced-failure fallback renders; standardized Scope/Cost/Timeline/Confidence/Rationale block visible.
Dependencies: Inspection detail route + estimate generation flow

Name: Backend verification pass for fixed services
Acceptance Tests: Service boot logs clean; smoke checks pass; issues captured with exact repro.

Name: Owner maintenance flow polish (request + comment boundaries)
Definition of Done: Owner can create request (propertyId required) and comment; owner cannot perform operational maintenance mutations.
Acceptance Tests: Permission tests pass for allowed/denied paths; UI error messaging explicit.

Name: MVP demo script finalization + acceptance checklist
Definition of Done: Single runbook for tenant→PM→owner journey with checklist and fallback plan.
Acceptance Tests: Dry run completes in <15 minutes without ambiguous steps.

Name: Build launch-day checklist
Definition of Done: Create launch-day checklist covering final QA, demo flow, rollback, and communications.
Acceptance Tests: Checklist reviewed and usable for launch rehearsal.

Name: Empty/loading/error states consistency sweep
Definition of Done: Standardize empty/loading/error states across major PMS views.
Acceptance Tests: Design/UX pass complete across target pages.

Name: Audit log coverage matrix for sensitive endpoints
Definition of Done: Create endpoint-level matrix mapping sensitive actions to audit log coverage.
Acceptance Tests: Matrix complete; gaps identified and prioritized.
